dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Select a menu item from the sidebar to get started.
dashboard.noRecentGroupActivity: No recent student submissions in your groups yet.

dashboardState.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading. Please try again.

problems.title: Problems
problems.submitConfirmDescription: Your current editor contents will be sent to the judge. You can come back and resubmit after reviewing the result.
problems.sourceFileLoadFailed: Failed to read the selected source file.
problems.createDescription: Set up a new problem with test cases and limits.
problems.editDescription: Edit problem details and test cases.
problems.deleteDialogDescription: "{title}" will be permanently removed only if it has no submissions and no assignment links.
problems.deleteHelpText: Deletion is permanent and only allowed while this problem has no submissions and no assignment links.
problems.deleteBlocked: This problem cannot be deleted because it still has {submissions} submission(s) and {assignments} assignment link(s).
problems.titleTooLong: Title must be 200 characters or less
problems.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 50,000 characters or less
problems.invalidTimeLimit: Time limit must be between 100 and 10,000 milliseconds
problems.invalidMemoryLimit: Memory limit must be between 16 and 1,024 MB
problems.noTestCases: No test cases yet. Add at least one to make the problem judgeable.
problems.testCaseFileLoadFailed: Failed to read the selected test case file.
problems.testCaseInputRequired: Each test case needs an input
problems.testCaseOutputRequired: Each test case needs an expected output
problems.tooManyTestCases: You can add up to 100 test cases per problem
problems.testCasesLocked: Test cases cannot be changed after submissions exist for this problem
problems.testCasesLockedNotice: Test cases are locked because this problem already has submissions. You can still edit the statement and limits.
problems.testCasesUnlockWarning: Admin override is enabled. Changing test cases can invalidate earlier submission results.
problems.showDetailedResults: Show test case results to students
problems.showRuntimeErrors: Show runtime error details to students

submissionErrors.unauthorized: Please sign in again and retry your submission.
submissionErrors.forbidden: You do not have permission to submit to this problem.
submissionErrors.problemRequired: Problem information is missing. Refresh the page and try again.
submissionErrors.problemNotFound: This problem could not be found.
submissionErrors.assignmentContextRequired: Open this problem from the assignment page so your progress is recorded correctly.
submissionErrors.assignmentNotFound: This assignment could not be found.
submissionErrors.assignmentNotStarted: This assignment is not open for submissions yet.
submissionErrors.assignmentEnrollmentRequired: You must be enrolled in this assignment's group to submit.
submissionErrors.assignmentProblemMismatch: This problem is not part of the selected assignment.
submissionErrors.languageNotSupported: This language is not currently available for submissions.
submissionErrors.sourceCodeTooLarge: Your source code exceeds the allowed size limit.
submissionErrors.submissionRateLimited: You are submitting too quickly. Please wait a moment before trying again.
submissionErrors.tooManyPendingSubmissions: You already have too many submissions waiting to be judged. Please wait for them to finish.
submissionErrors.judgeQueueFull: The judge queue is currently full. Please try again in a few minutes.
submissionErrors.examNotStarted: You must start the exam before submitting.

problems.assignmentSelectionDescription: This problem is part of an assignment. Open it from the assignment page to submit.
problems.assignmentSelectionSubmitHint: Choose one of the assignments above to submit this problem with the correct assignment context.

problemSets.title: Problem Sets
problemSets.createDescription: Create a new set of problems.
problemSets.editDescription: Update the problem set name, description, and linked problems.
problemSets.problemsDescription: Select problems to include in this set.
problemSets.groupsDescription: Groups that have access to the problems in this set.
problemSets.removeGroupConfirm: Remove this group from the problem set?
problemSets.removeGroupConfirmDescription: Students in "{group}" will lose access to problems that are only available through this problem set.
problemSets.deleteDialogDescription: "{name}" will be permanently removed. Problems themselves will not be deleted.
problemSets.problemSetNameTooLong: Name must be 200 characters or less
problemSets.problemSetDescriptionTooLong: Description must be 2,000 characters or less
problemSets.problemSetProblemDuplicate: Each problem can only be added once
problemSets.tooManyProblemSetProblems: You can add up to 200 problems to a set

submissions.title: My Submissions
submissions.description: View your submission history and results.
submissions.noSubmissions: You haven't made any submissions yet.
submissions.searchPlaceholder: Search by problem title or user name...
submissions.compileOutputHidden: Compile error details are not available for this submission.
submissions.detailedResultsHidden: Detailed test case results are not available for this submission.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: View your enrolled groups and assignments.
groups.createDialogDescription: Create a new group for your class.
groups.nameTooLong: Group name must be 100 characters or less
groups.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 500 characters or less
groups.noGroups: You are not enrolled in any groups.
groups.noMembers: No students are enrolled in this group yet.
groups.availableStudentsEmpty: All active students are already enrolled in this group.
groups.removeMemberDialogTitle: Remove this member from the group?
groups.removeMemberDialogDescription: {name} will lose access to this group and its assignments.
groups.bulkAddNoneSelected: Select at least one student to enroll.
groups.studentNotFound: The selected student could not be found.
groups.studentInactive: This student account is inactive and cannot be enrolled.
groups.studentRoleInvalid: Only active student accounts can be enrolled in a group.
groups.studentAlreadyEnrolled: This student is already enrolled in the group.
groups.groupMemberRemovalBlocked: This member cannot be removed because they already have assignment submissions in this group.
groups.archiveConfirmDescription: Archiving "{name}" will mark it as inactive. Members will retain access to view their submissions, but no new submissions will be expected. You can unarchive it later.
groups.unarchiveConfirmDescription: Unarchiving "{name}" will mark it as active again.
groups.assignmentCreateDialogDescription: Add a new assignment with problems and deadlines.
groups.assignmentEditDialogDescription: Update the assignment details and linked problems.
groups.assignmentDeleteBlocked: This assignment cannot be deleted because it already has {submissions} submission(s).
groups.assignmentDeleteDialogDescription: "{title}" will be permanently removed only if it has no assignment-linked submissions.
groups.assignmentProblemsDescription: Select problems and set point values.
groups.assignmentProblemsLocked: Problems are locked because submissions already exist. You can still edit other settings.
groups.assignmentProblemsUnlockWarning: Changing problems after submissions exist may invalidate past grades.
groups.assignmentProblemRequired: Add at least one problem to the assignment.
groups.assignmentProblemDuplicate: Each assignment problem can only be added once.
groups.assignmentProblemForbidden: One or more selected problems are not available for this group.
groups.assignmentTitleTooLong: Assignment title must be 200 characters or less.
groups.assignmentDescriptionTooLong: Assignment description must be 5,000 characters or less.
groups.assignmentLatePenaltyInvalid: Late penalty must be between 0 and 100.
groups.assignmentScheduleInvalid: The start time must be before the deadline.
groups.assignmentLateDeadlineInvalid: The late deadline must be on or after the deadline.
groups.examModeDescription_scheduled: Fixed start/end time. All students take the exam simultaneously.
groups.examModeDescription_windowed: Personal timer. Each student starts their own countdown.
groups.examDurationDescription: How many minutes each student has once they start.
groups.examDurationRequired: Exam duration is required for windowed mode.
groups.examWindowRequired: Windowed mode requires both a start time and deadline.
groups.examScheduleRequired: Scheduled mode requires both a start time and deadline.
groups.scoringModelDescription_ioi: Partial credit by test cases passed. Best score kept.
groups.scoringModelDescription_icpc: Problems are either fully accepted or rejected. Ranking by problems solved, then penalty time.
groups.freezeLeaderboardDescription: Students see frozen standings after this time. Instructors see live data.
groups.examStartConfirmDescription: You will have {duration} minutes to complete this exam. The timer cannot be paused or restarted once started.
groups.examModeChangeBlocked: Cannot change exam mode because students have already started their exams.
groups.examTimingChangeBlocked: Cannot change exam timing because students have already started their exams.
groups.tooManyAssignmentProblems: You can add up to 100 problems to an assignment.
groups.noAssignmentProblems: No problems linked yet. Add at least one problem to create the assignment.

assignmentDetail.noFilteredStudents: No students match the current filters.
assignmentDetail.studentSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, username, or class

users.title: User Management
users.deactivateDialogDescription: @{username} will keep their data, but they will lose access to protected areas on their next request.
users.restoreDialogDescription: @{username} will be able to sign in and use protected areas again.
users.autoGeneratedPasswordNotice: A secure one-time password will be generated automatically when you create this user.
users.generatedPasswordDescription: This password is shown only once. Copy it now and share it securely with the user.
users.generatedPasswordWarning: Once you close this dialog, you will not be able to see this password again.
users.generatedPasswordCopyFailed: Failed to copy the generated password
users.newPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep the current password.
users.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action
users.cannotDeactivateSelf: You cannot deactivate your own account
users.cannotDeactivateSuperAdmin: The super admin account cannot be deactivated
users.onlySuperAdminCanChangeSuperAdminRole: Only a super admin can change the super admin role
users.cannotChangeSuperAdminRole: The super admin role cannot be changed
users.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
users.passwordTooLong: Password must be 128 characters or less
users.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
users.bulkCsvEmpty: CSV file is empty or has no data rows.
users.bulkCsvHint: Required columns: username, name. Optional: email, role, class. Max 200 rows.
users.deleteDialogDescription: @{username} and all their submissions, enrollments, and comments will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
users.cannotDeleteSuperAdmin: The super admin account cannot be deleted
users.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account
users.deleteUserFailed: Failed to delete user. Please try again.

submissions.title: All Submissions
submissions.description: View and manage all submissions across the system.
submissions.searchPlaceholder: Search by user name or problem title...

loginLogs.noEvents: No login events matched the current filters.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Identifier, user, IP, or user agent

auditLogs.noEvents: No audit events matched the current filters.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.siteTitleHint: Leave blank to use the localized default. Current effective title: {current}
settings.siteDescriptionHint: Leave blank to use the localized default. Current effective description: {current}
settings.timeZoneHint: Leave blank to use the default application timezone. Current effective timezone: {current}
settings.aiAssistantEnabledHint: When disabled, the AI assistant is hidden on all problems regardless of per-problem settings.
settings.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
settings.siteTitleTooLong: Site title must be 100 characters or less
settings.siteDescriptionTooLong: Site description must be 255 characters or less
settings.invalidTimeZone: Enter a valid IANA timezone such as Asia/Seoul
settings.unauthorized: You are not authorized to update system settings
settings.backupDescription: Download a backup of the database or restore from a previous backup.
settings.restoreWarning: Restoring a database will replace ALL current data. A pre-restore backup will be saved automatically. The application may need to be restarted after restore. Only super administrators can restore.
settings.restoreSuccess: Database restored successfully. Please restart the application.
settings.invalidSqliteFile: Invalid file. Please upload a valid SQLite database file.

roles.title: Role Management
roles.roleNameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores. Cannot be changed later.
roles.levelHint: Determines role hierarchy. Higher level = more privilege (0-2).
roles.deleteConfirmDescription: The role "{name}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
roles.cannotDeleteWithUsers: This role has {count} assigned users. Reassign them before deleting.
roles.roleNameExists: A role with this name already exists.
roles.cannotReduceSuperAdmin: Super Admin capabilities cannot be reduced.
roles.cannotChangeBuiltinLevel: Built-in role levels cannot be changed.

actions.resetAllConfirm: Reset ALL languages to their default configuration? This cannot be undone.

edit.title: Edit Language Configuration
edit.compileCommandHelp: Leave blank for interpreted languages. Use {file} for the source file path.
edit.runCommandHelp: Command to execute the program. Use {file} or {binary} as placeholders.
edit.resetConfirm: Reset this language to its default configuration?

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your account settings and preferences.
profile.name: Name
profile.editProfileDesc: Update your name and class. Contact an admin to change your email.

profile.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or less
profile.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
profile.classNameTooLong: Class must be 100 characters or less
profile.emailChangeNotAllowed: Email changes must be handled by an administrator

changePassword.description: You must change your password before continuing.

rankings.description: User rankings by number of solved problems.

rankings.problemRankingsDescription: Rankings for this problem by execution time.

contests.description: Timed exams and contests across all your groups.
